name: Haruka Sakurai
description:
"I thought that… Maybe it’s fine if I can’t go back to the outside world that won’t give me any attention."

Sakurai Haruka (櫻 [さく] 井 [らい] 遥 [はるか]) is one of the 10 prisoners in MILGRAM. His code number is 001.

Haruka would like to befriend you !

(Art found on pinterest)
creator: Shima Shizuka
